style_name: dreamy synth anime noir within dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance
song_motif: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles

color_rules.rule: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights

camera_language: wide establishing anime frame with the protagonist small but clearly identifiable
close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
close-up profile or low-angle tilt down, shallow depth isolating the face
intimate close-up profile shifting to a three-quarter emotional reveal
slow pullback from the signature prop to the full silhouette
transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles, neon reflections, and airy pads, soft bloom, slow neon trails, glassy reflections
